name: Goldstone LLC
tagline: Copper. Silver. Gold. Nevada Mining Properties.

a11y_followups.homepage.on_bg_eyebrow_contrast: Lighthouse flags the small copper-bright eyebrow on --bg as text contrast below 4.5:1. Handoff section 3.4 classifies these eyebrows as UI labels governed by WCAG 1.4.11 non-text contrast, where 3:1 is the intended bar; preserve --copper-bright unless the user reopens that locked decision.

default_meta.description: Goldstone LLC markets patented gold, copper and silver mining properties in Eureka and Humboldt Counties, Nevada — documented in USGS MRDS and Mindat. Direct from the principal, Dennis Blancey. Operating since 1989.
